allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|ENOENT" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object -First 10 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Page loaded OK, length=$\($response.Length\)")
